parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
!pragma handwritten true
skinparam backgroundColor #EFEBE0
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor #00BFFF
    ActorBorderColor #00BFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #00BFFF
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #B0E0E6
    ParticipantBorderColor #1E90FF
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #1E90FF
    ParticipantFontColor white
    ActorFontColor #1E90FF
}

title 登陆流程图

actor User
participant Client
participant OpenLDAP
participant ActiveDirectory

activate User
User -[#00BFFF]> Client : **1** 请求登陆服务器(邮箱，密码)
activate Client
Client -[#00BFFF]> OpenLDAP : **2** 验证用户
deactivate Client
activate OpenLDAP
OpenLDAP -[#00BFFF]> ActiveDirectory : **3** 验证用户
deactivate OpenLDAP
activate ActiveDirectory
ActiveDirectory -[#00BFFF]> OpenLDAP : **4** 返回验证结果
activate OpenLDAP
OpenLDAP -[#00BFFF]> Client : **5** 返回组信息，sudo 信息等
deactivate OpenLDAP
activate Client
deactivate Client
User -[#00BFFF]> Client : **6** 用户登录 Client
activate Client
deactivate Client
deactivate ActiveDirectory
deactivate User

@enduml
```
